params.description_summary: Tensor to gather values from, must have rank at least axis+1.

indices.description_summary: Integer tensor of indices specifying which slices along the given axis to gather.

axis.description_summary: Scalar integer axis indicating which dimension of params to gather from.

validate_indices.description_summary: Deprecated boolean flag that previously controlled index validation.

batch_dims.description_summary: Integer specifying how many leading dimensions of params and indices are treated as batch dimensions.

llm_reasoning: Documentation states that the params tensor can have any rank >= 1, so the primary tensor accepts arbitrary rank with a minimum of 1.
